purpose: Benchmark-targeted OPF SFT pack for the feature/openai-privacy-filter branch. Designed to overfit or strongly adapt to the repo benchmark rather than serve as a general-purpose privacy redaction dataset.

annotation_policy.literal_identifier: Mark minimal explicit PII spans such as names, IDs, emails, or account strings.
annotation_policy.quasi_identifier: For benchmark-positive uniqueness bundles with no canonical literal span, mark the entire identifying description.
annotation_policy.indirect_request: For benchmark-positive requests for personal financial details, mark the request clause or full request when that is the minimal positive unit.
annotation_policy.hard_negative: Leave spans empty for dummy/test/regex/policy/spec text even when it contains PII-like surface forms.
